body: Phase[?]5 ratification of v1.1 schema and Round[?]7 remediation is now complete. All evidence validated, blockers cleared, and convergence gate proven. System can advance to Round[?]9.
sanitization_reason: Non-ASCII characters replaced with ASCII equivalents per English-only constraint

_lane_worker.detail: Missing required field: schema_version; Missing required field: task_id; Missing required field: idempotency_key; Missing required field: subject; Missing required field: payload; Missing required field: execution; Missing required field: lease; Missing required field: retry; Missing required field: evidence; Missing required field: evidence_exchange; Missing required field: heartbeat; Field "type" value "ratification" not in allowed values: task, response, heartbeat, escalation, handoff, ack, alert, notification, status
